subcodes.first_line: O Most Exalted Pen! Make mention of them whom We have related unto Thy most exalted Self, and commemorate them with such remembrances whereby [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلم الاعلی ان اذکر الذین نسبناهم الی نفسک العلیا ثم اذکرهم باذکار بها
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
